title: Pollination Population
role_summary: Denver experimental music project led by Katherine Ersing; appeared on alphabets' REMIX10 (2010).
body:
# Pollination Population

Denver experimental music project led by **Katherine Ersing**. Featured on alphabets' REMIX10 as track 24: **POLLINATION POPULATION (sisterhood glow mix)**. Ersing's sound is described as melodies made from bells, acoustic guitar, and cassette tape samples, incorporating ambient sounds (traffic, conversation) into fluid compositions. Westword noted the project as best experienced live.

Featured in Westword, August 18, 2010, around the same time as the REMIX10 compilation.

## Sources
- [Westword — Katherine Ersing of Pollination Population](https://www.westword.com/music/katherine-ersing-of-pollination-population-on-being-inspired-by-the-organic-sounds-around-her-5700355/)
- [alphabets Bandcamp — REMIX10](https://alphabets.bandcamp.com/album/remix10)
